title: achillea ageratifolia subsp. serbica
intro: Achillea ageratifolia subsp. serbica, commonly known as the Greek yarrow or Serbian yarrow, is a subspecies of the yarrow plant, belonging to the Asteraceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Achillea ageratifolia subsp. serbica include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or essential oil, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies.
